Solutions Product Resources Company Login Book a Demo
We Make the Internet Safer

No matter your area of expertise, you can help bring integrity and accountability to the online world. Scroll down to find out more about Pagefreezer, its values, and its people.

Join Us
Leading with Values

Everything, from our products and services to our people programs, are built on the foundation of our six core values.

Make it Personal

We treat colleagues, customers and collaborators as individuals, with integrity and care, always taking extra steps to make these relationships authentic.

Speak Your Mind

We spend just as much time listening as talking, invite multiple perspectives, and build trust and respect through honest, transparent, and direct communication.

Win & Lose as a Team 

We strive, struggle, and succeed as a team to create added value while leaving egos at the door regardless of location, role, department, or seniority.

Improve Continuously

We pursue learning and growth while incrementally iterating – personally and professionally.

Create Balance Everywhere

We are flexible, aim for middle ground, and never forget to have fun.

And Make it Happen

We are proactive, empowered, and accountable as leaders to innovate solutions we’re proud of.

Fighting Online Harms
